scaffold.topic: Strategic approach to boss fights for this character
scaffold.scope: Principles for act-ending boss encounters, where HP fully restores between acts.
dimensions_to_consider: How boss fights differ from hallway fights — what the win condition requires given the longer timeline
How HP and potion usage compare to hallway combat
Front-loaded burst vs scaling commitment trade-offs
When to commit to a Power card vs continue applying pressure
How to recognize when the current build is insufficient for this boss and what options remain
out_of_scope: Per-boss mechanics or specific phase counters -> belongs in combat_guides
Specific Power-card play orders -> belongs in card_memory
Specific HP / damage thresholds tied to one boss

format_constraints.structure: 4-7 numbered principles. Each = one imperative declarative sentence + one short concrete example.

content: TBD - filled by Mode B postrun
